title: hedyotis prainiana
intro: Hedyotis prainiana, also known as Thai motherwort or Prain's hedyotis, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Hedyotis prainiana is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia.
